νουθέτημα, ατος, τό (νοῦς, τίθημι; Aeschyl. et al.; also Herodas 7, 11) admonition, discipline 1 Cl 56:6 (Job 5:17).—DELG s.v. νόος.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Herodas Herodas , a.k.a. Herondas, III b.c.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 679
